text.title: Internationalization (i18n) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. The skip-this-methodology branch is always reachable.

decision-tree.root-question: Will the product ship to ≥2 locales OR include RTL within 2 quarters?

conclusion.verdict: extract via ICU + Intl + logical CSS + CI drift

text.example: Audit finds 142 hardcoded en strings + 3 manual currency concats + 18 margin-left uses → extract → Intl format → logical CSS → CI key-drift → Crowdin pipeline.
